The '''Fighting 357th Serenaders''' were a [[Militia/Legends|militia]] [[Band/Legends|band]] from [[Bela Vistal/Legends|Bela Vistal]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. Members of the band included [[Grondorn Muse]] and [[Vincol Dunker]].
